changelog: Fixed: Toast UI – removed backdrop blur and semi-transparent background for solid, consistent toasts across platforms.
Fixed: History screen month overflow – added max-w-xs truncate to month name to prevent overflow on small screens.
Feature: Download button per workout – exports workout JSON and associated media with success toast notification.
Fixed: Data loss on login – delayed local timestamp bump until after hydration and initial sync attempt, preventing false optimistic‑lock skips that caused web app to show empty state after login.
Fixed: TypeScript safety in ExerciseDetailsModal – added explicit typings to all .map() callbacks and corrected movementPattern comparison with type assertion.

Fixed: Theme synchronization – themeMode (light/dark/system) now included in cloud sync payload and persisted on receipt, ensuring theme settings persist across devices and survive logout/login cycles.
